title: mikania lepidophora
intro: Mikania lepidophora, also known as "corteza de lepidophora" or "wild angelica," is a plant species native to Central and South America, belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Mikania lepidophora include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against infections, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Mikania lepidophora can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
